full_text:
Sun Deng (Zigao) 孫登 (子高)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Deng (孫登), styledZigao (子高), was born in Wu. Set to be Quan’s successor, but died young. Kind and sought out goodness. Sun Deng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Deng lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
